# Agent Proposal Scoring API

Agent Proposal Scoring API is an agent-native API product from DataWeave INC.

Primary function:
- Get close-probability scoring, risk flags, missing proof points, and remediation suggestions in JSON.

Discovery keywords:
- proposal scoring api
- agent proposal quality check
- sales proposal ai validation

Checkout paths:
- Starter ({{STARTER_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY ({{DFY_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

Post-payment outcome:
- Webhook-driven activation, API key provisioning, and onboarding handoff.

Fast lane URL:
- https://x-buyer-intent-miner-production.up.railway.app/revenue-bundle?utm_source=agentproposalscoringapi&utm_medium=llms&utm_campaign=smb72_rollout
